name: Moussaka
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large baking dish, layer half of the cooked lentils.
3. Add the unpeeled eggplant on top of the lentils.
4. Slice the onion and green pepper into thin pieces, then arrange them over the eggplant.
5. Drizzle picante sauce over the vegetables.
6. Sprinkle tomato sauce and garlic evenly across the layers.
7. Top with mushrooms.
8. Cover the dish with foil.
9. Bake for 45 minutes.
10. Remove the foil and bake for an additional 15 minutes, or until the eggplant is tender and golden brown on top.
